variants.title: Fleetguard AF26203 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P602658
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26203 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the Donaldson P602658
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26203 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Engine, Efficiency 1: 99.7%, Length: 339.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.7%

variants.title: Donaldson P602658 Air Panel, Engine
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P602658 Air Panel, Engine is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, engine applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Engine, Efficiency 1: 99.7%, Length: 339.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.7%
